tools.name: generate_changelog
tools.description: Generate a Markdown changelog from a list of commit messages. Supports conventional commits and heuristic classification.

tools.name: format_release_notes
tools.description: Format polished release notes for a given version, suitable for GitHub Releases or a product changelog page.

tools.name: generate_pr_description
tools.description: Generate a pull request description with summary, change stats, and a test checklist.

tools.name: summarize_commits
tools.description: Produce a short natural-language summary and structured breakdown of a set of commits.

tools.name: detect_breaking_changes
tools.description: Detect breaking changes from commit messages and/or a git diff. Returns a list of breaking items and a version-bump recommendation.
